title: salvia officinalis subsp. lavandulifolia
intro: Salvia officinalis subsp. lavandulifolia, also known as Spanish sage, is a subspecies of the sage plant that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Salvia officinalis subsp. lavandulifolia include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cognitive function, and supporting respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
